{{Quote|The Elrood sector isn’t threatened by the Yuuzhan Vong. Do you think he’d have any use for relief supplies?|Lando Calrissian about Chau Feswin|<ref name="Destiny" />}}
'''Chau Feswin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representing the  [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].

==Biography==
He represented [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] and the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] circa [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. He sat on the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Talon Karrde]] attempted to persuade him with relief supplies in order to obtain a affirmative vote that would increase funding for the [[YVH 1]] combat droids. Later the duo also used a recording of that conversation in order to blackmail him into voting yes for [[Cal Omas]] during the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] elections.<ref name="Destiny" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
